their small and friendly team is ready to welcome you into the fold! work is allocated to each midwife when they arrive on shift, meaning lots of variety in your work. as a smaller hospital, you'll enjoy creating and maintaining stronger bonds with your mothers and their babies. gunnedah - is more than just a town — it's a lifestyle. nestled in the heart of north-west nsw, it's the koala capital of the world and a place where nature, community, and opportunity meet. it's the type of welcoming community where people say hello to each other on the street - are you ready to be embraced by gunnadah?inverell - champion the women in your community by providing true continuity of care. women are allowed to stay within the hospital until they decide they're ready to go home. if you're looking to empower local women and support their own healthcare choices, then inverell is the place for you!manning - are you a midwife looking for a team that champions education and ongoing professional development? look no further than manning base hospital. the team are a friendly and welcoming group, regularly sharing their knowledge and supporting each other in their professional goals. situated within the stunning barrington coast, it is one of the few places where you can go from the beautiful beaches of the mid-north coast to the picturesque national parks of the manning valley in 90 minutes. moree - located in north-western nsw, moree is a regional centre known for its natural artesian hot springs, rich agricultural heritage, and welcoming community. it’s a place where career, culture, and quality of life come together. looking to kickstart your career in midwifery? moree maternity offers a supportive learning environment where career growth is championed. if you want a great start to your midwifery goals, look no further than moree. narrabri - join their close-knit group, not just with the maternity service group but within the wider service that narrabri provides. as a rural hospital, there is lots of opportunity for you to take on a varied range of tasks. the team are completely committed to building and developing their own staff, so if continued learning and growth are what you're after, then narrabri is the place for you!scone - are you a dual registered nurse and midwife looking for variety in your role? look no further than the horse capital of australia. not only will you be working within the maternity team to provide holistic care to our community's women and their babies, but during quiet periods, you'll be given the opportunity to expand your skillset by working in the emergency department.singleton - located only 60 minutes from newcastle, singleton maternity is renowned for their positive culture and low turnover as a result. enjoy being the newest member of this friendly team whilst soaking up the best of what a rural lifestyle has to offer. tamworth -
